raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Esaijus: Schi
buhs ta Sihme no ta KUNGA/
ka tas KUNGS scho Leetu dar-
rihs/ ko wiꞥsch irr runnajs. Buhs
tai Ehnai defmits Zellinus us
preekfschu eet/ jeb defmits Zelli-
nus atpakkat?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Iskijus: Tas
irr lehti/ ka ta Ehna defmits Zel-
linus us preekfschu eet/ to es ne
gribbu/ bet lai ta Ehna defmits
Zellinus atpakkat eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Praweets Esaijus
peetanze to KUNGU/ un tas lik-
ke to Ehnu defmits Zellinus at-
pakkat eet/ zaur teem pöscheem
Zellixeem/ ka ta us preekfschu
bija gabijusi pee Akasa Saules
Stundeni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tanni Laika subtija Bro-
daks Baledaus/Baledana Dehls
tas Babeles Rehninisch/Grahma-
tas un Dahwanas us Istiju / jo
tas bij dsirdejs/ ka Istijus bija
neweffels bijis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Istijus klaustija tohs/
un rahdija teem wiſſu fawu
Mantas Namnu/ to Sudrabu
un Seltu/un tahs dahrgas Sah-
les/ un to labbaku Etji/un wiſſu
fawu Bruunu-Nainu/ un wiſſ/
kaſ eekſch winna Mantahm at-
raſts kina/ ne kahda Leeta bija
winna Namna nedswiſſawin-
na Walstiba/ ko Istijus teem ne
buhtu rahdijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze tas Praweets
Esaijus pee ta Rehnina Istiju /
un fazzija us to: Ko irr fehee
Wihti fazzijſchi? un no kurrenes
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "irr tee pee tew nahktichi? tad faz-
zija Iskijus : Tee irr no tahlas
Seimmes atnahkuschi/ no Ba-
veles.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas fazzija: Ko irr tee
tawa Namnā redsejtchi? un
Iskijus fazzija: Tee irr wiſſu/
tas manna Namnā irr / redsejt-
tchi/ ne kahda Leeta irr eekſch
mannahm Mantahm/ ko es teem
ne buhtu rahdijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Esaijus us
Iskiju : Klaust ta KUNGA
Wahrdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rangi/ tas Laiks nahks/
ka wiſſ/ kas tawa Namnā irr/
un ko tawi Tehwi lihdſchodeen
irr peelikluschi / taps us Babelt
wests/ ne neeka taps atlizzinachts/
takka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ir no taweem Behr-
neein/ kas no tewis dsins/ ko
tu dsemdinasfi/ taps xemti/ka tee
par Kambar Junkureem buhs ta
Babeles Rehnina Ptlli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Istijus fazzija us
Esaiju: Ta KUNGA Wahrs
irr labs / ko wiꞥsch irr runnajs.
Webl fazzija wiꞥsch: Un ka nez
tad tikcai Meers un Teefiba man-
nā Laika buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas weht no Istijus
Leetahn atteek / un wiſſ wiara
Spehts/ un ko wiꞥsch irr darrijs/
tas Dthkis/ un tas Uhdens
Grahwis / ka tas irr Uhdent
Pilsfahta waddinajs / tas wiſſ
irr rakstihts to Rehmnu no Juu-
da Laiku-Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Istijus aismigge ar
Ecccc 3
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
